name: engram-plugin
preamble: Refines L1's E2 Engram plugin into three internal containers — skill markdown files that drive agent behavior, shell hooks fired on Claude Code lifecycle events, and a Go CLI binary that performs all computation. External actors and the on-disk store keep their L1 E-IDs.

elements.name: Developer
elements.subtitle: uses Claude Code
elements.responsibility: Engineer who triggers slash-commands and writes prompts that produce memories
elements.system_of_record: Human, at a Claude Code session

elements.name: Engram plugin
elements.responsibility: Plugin providing persistent, query-ranked memory: skills decide when to load context, a slim Go binary computes recall/learn, hooks remind the agent at session and tool-use boundaries

elements.name: Claude Code
elements.subtitle: agent harness
elements.responsibility: Agent harness that loads skills, fires hooks, and execs the engram binary when the agent shells out

elements.name: Claude Code memory surfaces
elements.responsibility: Read-only inputs to recall ranking: project + user `CLAUDE.md`, `.claude/rules/*.md`, auto-memory, skill frontmatter
elements.system_of_record: Owned by Claude Code and the user

elements.name: Anthropic API
elements.subtitle: Haiku
elements.responsibility: Haiku model used for candidate ranking, snippet extraction, and learn-time classification

elements.name: Engram memory store
elements.subtitle: ~/.local/share/engram/memory/
elements.responsibility: On-disk memory state: feedback TOML under `~/.local/share/engram/memory/feedback/` and fact TOML under `~/.local/share/engram/memory/facts/`. The filesystem belongs to the OS; Engram only reads and writes within these paths
elements.system_of_record: XDG data home on the user's machine

elements.name: Skills
elements.subtitle: prepare / learn / recall / remember / migrate / c4
elements.responsibility: Markdown skill files (`skills/{prepare,learn,recall,remember,migrate,c4}/SKILL.md`) that Claude Code loads on command or auto-trigger; bodies instruct the agent to call `engram` subcommands and present results

elements.name: Hooks
elements.subtitle: session-start / user-prompt-submit / post-tool-use
elements.responsibility: Three bash scripts (`hooks/session-start.sh`, `hooks/user-prompt-submit.sh`, `hooks/post-tool-use.sh`) wired by `hooks/hooks.json`; emit JSON `additionalContext`, async-rebuild the binary on SessionStart

elements.name: engram CLI binary
elements.subtitle: recall · learn · list · show · update
elements.responsibility: Go binary (entry `cmd/engram/main.go`) implementing subcommands `recall`, `learn {feedback,fact}`, `list`, `show`, `update`. All I/O lives here; pure logic in `internal/{recall,memory,cli,…}`. Built by `session-start.sh` to `~/.claude/engram/bin/engram`; execed by Claude Code

relationships.description: loads skill markdown on /command and on auto-trigger
execs the binary as a subprocess each time the agent's Bash tool runs an engram subcommand
skill bodies returned to agent context include instructions to shell out to engram subcommands
relationships.protocol: Skill body text rendered into context

relationships.description: session-start.sh runs go build and writes a fresh binary when source files are newer than cached mtime
relationships.protocol: go build, file mtime check, file write

relationships.description: emit hookSpecificOutput.additionalContext (and systemMessage) on stdout to inject reminders and the skill-availability banner
ranks candidates and extracts snippets via Haiku; classifies feedback/facts during learn
reads CLAUDE.md, .claude/rules, auto-memory, skill frontmatter for ranking
reads existing feedback + fact TOML during recall/list/show; writes new TOML during learn/remember/update
prints briefings, recall results, and other subcommand output to stdout, which re-enters the agent's context as the tool result
